titleStmt.title: 102. Memorandum From the Director of the Bureau of Intelligence and Research (Hilsman) and the Deputy Director for Plans, Central Intelligence Agency () and the Deputy Director for Plans, Central Intelligence Agency (Miller) to the President’s Special Assistant for National Security Affairs () to the President’s Special Assistant for National Security Affairs (Bundy))

div.head: 102. Memorandum From the Director of the Bureau of Intelligence and Research (Hilsman) and the Deputy Director for Plans, Central Intelligence Agency (Miller) to the President’s Special Assistant for National Security Affairs (Bundy)
div.note: [Source: Kennedy Library, National Security Files, Departments and Agencies Series, Central Intelligence Agency, General, 5/62–12/62. Secret. 4 pages of source text not declassified.]
